title: The Eminence in Shadow
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 (20) + S2 (12, eps 21-32) = 32 total. Paired with the Anri Sakano manga adaptation (ongoing, ~60 chapters). Both adapt the Daisuke Aizawa light novel. Per-arc chapter boundaries approximate.

mappings.arc: Shadow Garden Founding / Diabolos Cult Intro
